title: Artificial Intelligence May Transform Drug Discovery for Brain Conditions
shortdescription: Researchers say artificial intelligence could dramatically speed up the discovery of new treatments for brain disorders by helping scientists identify promising drug candidates faster and more accurately.
description: Researchers say artificial intelligence could dramatically speed up the discovery of new treatments for brain disorders by helping scientists identify promising drug candidates faster and more accurately.
author: Gwen John

title: Kansas City Schools Replace 30,000 Chromebooks and PCs With Apple Devices
shortdescription: Kansas City Public Schools are replacing 30,000 Chromebooks and Windows computers with Apple devices in a major technology transformation aimed at improving digital learning and classroom experiences.
description: Kansas City Public Schools are replacing 30,000 Chromebooks and Windows computers with Apple devices in a major technology transformation aimed at improving digital learning and classroom experiences.
author: Gwen John

title: Standard Chartered to Cut Thousands of Roles as AI Use Increases
shortdescription: Standard Chartered plans to cut more than 7,000 jobs by 2030 as the global bank increases its use of artificial intelligence and automation to improve efficiency and profitability.
description: Standard Chartered plans to cut more than 7,000 jobs by 2030 as the global bank increases its use of artificial intelligence and automation to improve efficiency and profitability.
author: Gwen John

title: Treasury Liquidity Drain: $150 Billion in Settlements Could Pressure Stocks and Crypto
shortdescription: Up to $150B in Treasury settlements may drain market liquidity, raising risks for stocks, crypto, and global markets as dollar funding and yen volatility rise.
description: Liquidity tightening ahead: Treasury supply spike puts markets on watch as $150 billion in settlements could pressure stocks, crypto, and global risk assets.
author: Gwen John

title: ISRO Investigates PSLV-C62 Anomaly After EOS-N1 Satellite Loss
shortdescription: ISRO hit a snag in its PSLV-C62 mission late in flight, resulting in the loss of the EOS-N1 satellite.
description: The mission sent up 16 payloads including the strategic EOS-N1 satellite, all of which were lost after a third-stage anomaly.
author: Gwen John

title: Global Stock Markets Fall Sharply as Iran Conflict and Rising Oil Prices Shake Investor Confidence
shortdescription: Global stock markets fell as Iran conflict fears and rising oil prices fueled concerns over inflation, interest rates, and economic uncertainty worldwide.
description: Global stock markets turned lower as fears surrounding the Iran conflict resurfaced and investors reacted to rising oil prices and growing geopolitical uncertainty.
author: Gwen John

title: Wise (TransferWise) Reports $10 Billion Profit – Bigger Than JPMorgan
shortdescription: UK fintech disrupts global remittances — now most profitable bank on earth.
description: Zero-fee international transfers + 5% interest accounts = Wise passes 25 million customers and $10B annual profit.
author: Gwen John
